destinations.name: Goa
destinations.description: India's party capital with golden sandy beaches.

destinations.name: Andaman Islands
destinations.description: Pristine waters and coral reefs.

destinations.name: Havelock Island
destinations.description: Crystal clear waters and white sands.

destinations.name: Gokarna
destinations.description: Hippie vibe beaches and religious temples.

destinations.name: Varkala
destinations.description: Cliffs adjacent to the Arabian Sea.

destinations.name: Pondicherry
destinations.description: French colonial charm on the Bay of Bengal.

destinations.name: Manali
destinations.description: High-altitude Himalayan resort town.

destinations.name: Kullu
destinations.description: Valley of Gods covered in pine.

destinations.name: Ladakh
destinations.description: Vast desert mountains and ancient monasteries.

destinations.name: Spiti Valley
destinations.description: Rugged cold desert and ancient Buddhist culture.

destinations.name: Auli
destinations.description: Premier skiing destination in India.

destinations.name: Tawang
destinations.description: Hidden mountain beauty in the Northeast.

destinations.name: Alleppey
destinations.description: Serene backwaters and houseboat living.

destinations.name: Coorg
destinations.description: The Scotland of India with lush coffee plantations.

destinations.name: Jim Corbett
destinations.description: Oldest national park known for Bengal Tigers.

destinations.name: Kaziranga
destinations.description: Home of the one-horned rhinoceros.

destinations.name: Ranthambore
destinations.description: Famous tiger reserve with a historic fort.

destinations.name: Sunderbans
destinations.description: Largest mangrove forest, home to the Royal Bengal Tiger.

destinations.name: Varanasi
destinations.description: Spiritual capital of India.

destinations.name: Rishikesh
destinations.description: Yoga capital of the world.

destinations.name: Amritsar
destinations.description: Home to the glorious Golden Temple.

destinations.name: Hampi
destinations.description: Ancient ruins of the Vijayanagara Empire.

destinations.name: Jaipur
destinations.description: The Pink City known for palaces and forts.

destinations.name: Agra
destinations.description: Home of the Taj Mahal.

destinations.name: Khajuraho
destinations.description: Famous for intricately carved temples.

destinations.name: Darjeeling
destinations.description: Queen of the Hills with Himalayan views.

destinations.name: Ooty
destinations.description: Lush green valleys and scenic lakes.

destinations.name: Munnar
destinations.description: Rolling hills covered in tea plantations.

destinations.name: Shillong
destinations.description: The Scotland of the East.

destinations.name: Kodaikanal
destinations.description: Princess of Hill Stations with star-shaped lake.
